name: E-Smart Corp.
summary: PART I Item 1. Description of Business E-Smart Corp. (the Company, we, us or our) was incorporatedon June 6, 2023 under the laws of the State of Nevada United States of America. E-Smart Corp. is an innovative digital platform that aims to revolutionize the tattoo industry by efficiently connecting tattoo artists and clients.
